response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all mandatory for this role. Their background is heavily focused on web, full-stack, and non-embedded software, with no evidence of firmware, switch hardware, or embedded device control.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain open-source tools and infrastructure
Excellent communication and teaching skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX kernel contexts
Zero evidence of networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role
